project.name: PROJECT-GTKB-PUSH-GATE
project.notes: Authorized 2026-05-28 by owner direction in S365 chat: 'This is a very important enhancement of GT-KB. Please proceed in order.' Owner resolved three design tensions: (1) no amnesty - all errors must be found and fixed; (2) time-irrelevant execution with caching welcomed; (3) mechanical gate with mechanical blocker. See bridge/gtkb-push-gate-design-governance-review-001.md (forthcoming) for full design contract.
project.purpose: Comprehensive deterministic CI gate that mechanically blocks pushes to GitHub when any artifact fails any tracked check (lint, type, hardcoded-externals AST, tests, architecture assertions, security, governance integrity). No amnesty — all errors must be found and fixed. Time-irrelevant execution with content-addressed result cache for skipping unchanged-and-previously-passed artifacts. Mechanical blocker on both local pre-push hook and GitHub Actions branch protection.
project.scope_note: Spans Slice 0 (governance scoping) through Slice 11 (branch protection enable). Includes new scripts/push_gate.py CLI, content-addressed cache substrate, hardcoded-externals AST checker, integration with existing gt assert / gt project doctor / applicability/clause preflights / pytest suites, .github/workflows/push-gate.yml, .git/hooks/pre-push installer. Excludes runtime monitoring of deployed code (that is release-readiness scope).
project.target_outcome: Push gate active on develop + main branches; any defect class blocks until fixed; gate logic lives in repo with bridge-protocol governance for changes.
